prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-WOMENSRAZORS-6PC-2PK-BUN Product Type: MANUAL_SHAVING_RAZOR Brand (from catalog): All Pure Existing Title: All Pure Womens Razors 12 Pack with Swivel Blades Description: Are you sick and tired of razor bumps and nicks? You need the All Pure Womens 12 Piece Razor Blade Pack.

This set of razor blades comes with 12 pieces, so you won't need to worry about running out of razors any time soon. Each razor features 4 swivel blades that will aid grooming in hard to reach places as well as a lubricating strip to ensure a comfortable experience.

The razors feature ergonomic handles that will help keep your hand steady during shaving, and they come in a fun pink color that will match your other toiletries. This set of 6 razors is a great option for busy lifestyles.

This listing is for 2 sets of 6 razors (12 total razors). Search Terms: womens razor blades lubricating strip razors pink replacement grooming hair removal tools beauty routine cute refills girls for women Features: - 12 PIECE SET - Comes with 12 Razors | Don't Worry About Running Out of Fresh Razors - SWIVEL BLADES - Each Razor Comes with 4 Swivel Blades to Easily Shave Hard-to-Reach Spots - LUBRICATING STRIP - Helps Ensure Comfortable Experience During Shaving and Prevents Nicks and Bumps - ERGONOMIC HANDLE - Each Razor Comes with Comfortable Grip Handle to Help Keep Your Hand Steady - CUTE COLOR - Razors Come in Light Pink Color to Match Your Other Toiletries === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: All Pure Womens Razors 12 Pack Pink Swivel Blades

anthropic.title_differentiation: 4 Swivel Blades, Lubricating Strip, Ergonomic Handle, Prevents Nicks And Bumps, 12 Total Razors

openai.title_differentiation: 4 Swivel Blades, Lubricating Strip, Ergonomic Handle, Gentle Shave, Hard-To-Reach Areas, Pink Comfort Grip
